title: Why they never built an AT field gun
display_title: Why they never built an AT field gun
wikitext:
[]: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by bladerj » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:07 pm like a rocket or sth, put some random orphaned kid inside some goo like human dna clone of lilith, put into a rocket with a nuke, and blam ! toss it at the angels.......kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:11 pm bladerj wrote: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 9:15 pm Because it would take to long to make one and making an AT-Field gun would actually require an AT-Field sample(?) if that makes any sense. An Eva is just fine though. Some guns, like the positron rifle, are capable of piercing an AT-Field but a lot of power is required. bladerj wrote: kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Wed Dec 09, 2009 10:19 pm If you can make an A.T. missile, you might as well make another EVA. There's enough crap that can pierce through an AT Field by the endgame.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Dec 09, 2009 10:46 pm Because it's not really physically possible. Souls need to inhabit bodies if they're gonna inhabit anything at all, and something PWM if they're gonna project the AT Field offensively. So either way, it looks like this soul needs to inhabit an Adam clone, which always has an anthropomorphic shape. Their method of building Evangelions indicates that NERV doesn't have the ability to just mold this flesh into a gun like playdoh. And AT Fields cant' be shot like bullets because they're ego boundaries.

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by BC Baron » Thu Dec 10, 2009 12:20 am I think Aura Twilight summed up my thoughts on the subject quite well. Also, it's a bit off topic, but bladerj wrote: kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 10, 2009 7:46 am bladerj wrote: like a rocket or sth, put some random orphaned kid inside some goo like human dna clone of lilith, put into a rocket with a nuke, and blam ! toss it at the angels.......kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Thu Dec 10, 2009 10:21 am bladerj wrote: .......kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]: Re: Why they never built an AT-field gun ?             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Dec 10, 2009 12:17 pm bladerj wrote: like a rocket or sth, put some random orphaned kid inside some goo like human dna clone of lilith, put into a rocket with a nuke, and blam ! toss it at the angels.......kids are pretty easy to replace......

[]:             Quote Post by Apjak » Thu Dec 10, 2009 2:52 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Because it's not really physically possible. Souls need to inhabit bodies if they're gonna inhabit anything at all, and something PWM if they're gonna project the AT Field offensively. So either way, it looks like this soul needs to inhabit an Adam clone, which always has an anthropomorphic shape. Their method of building Evangelions indicates that NERV doesn't have the ability to just mold this flesh into a gun like playdoh. And AT Fields cant' be shot like bullets because they're ego boundaries.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Dec 10, 2009 3:34 pm Apjak wrote: Basically, to make an A. T. field gun, you'd have to make a gun that fires Evangelions. Not a very efficient use.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Dec 10, 2009 3:58 pm Apjak wrote: Basically, to make an A. T. field gun, you'd have to make a gun that fires Evangelions. Not a very efficient use.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Dec 10, 2009 3:59 pm Allemann wrote: Or you can clone many Kaworus and give each one a fragment of Adam's soul.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Dec 10, 2009 4:10 pm Allemann wrote: Apjak wrote: Basically, to make an A. T. field gun, you'd have to make a gun that fires Evangelions. Not a very efficient use.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 10, 2009 5:02 pm Either an Eva catapult or what I have created here.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Dec 10, 2009 5:39 pm Lol otakon the evagengelion cannon was what i had picture when the guy posted about it,ahahar

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 10, 2009 5:59 pm Is it just me, or is anyone else getting District 9 vibes from this topic?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Dec 10, 2009 7:02 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Oh, right, sure, let's just HAND OUT components for Third Impact to the Angels. Great idea thar.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Dec 10, 2009 7:17 pm Rei came from Lilith not Adam. So there’s no danger from her coming into contact with the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Dec 10, 2009 8:29 pm child of Lilith wrote: Rei came from Lilith not Adam. So there’s no danger from her coming into contact with the angels.
